hero.note: Platform numbers include GST correction (18%) and reconciliation against Shopify actuals. UTM coverage: 42% — campaign-level numbers are platform-reported and GST-corrected only.

warning: **UTM coverage: 42% (181 of 313 orders have no UTM tags).** This is below the 60% threshold. Campaign-level ROAS figures in this report are **platform-reported and GST-corrected** — not confirmed store-retained numbers. Fix UTMs before optimising by campaign. True retained ROAS is reported at account level only.

inflation_callout.title: Dashboard Inflation: Rs.6,22,824 overstated this month
inflation_callout.body: Dashboards report **3.03x ROAS** on Rs.4,43,544 spend = Rs.13,42,166 claimed revenue. Shopify net sales = **Rs.9,62,679**. The gap of **Rs.3,79,487** is from platforms double-counting cross-platform conversions, attributing returns, and ignoring GST. Add GST cost (Rs.79,838) and the effective shortfall vs dashboard expectations is **Rs.6,22,824**. Biggest leak: Returns/Reversals at **Rs.1,61,847** (13.7% of gross), followed by **GST invisible cost at Rs.79,838**.

cards.label: Dashboard Break-Even

breakeven.critical: 🔴 **Critical:** Dashboard ROAS of 3.03x = your actual break-even. Real store ROAS of 1.84x is below break-even at standard fashion margins. Every rupee of spend may be reducing profitability. Verify your COGS immediately.

actions.title: Highest-Impact Actions
actions.subtitle: 5 Actions This Week · DO THESE IN ORDER

items.title: Pause: Google PMax Loungewear — Rs.6,344 spend, Rs.0 revenue
items.body: Zero conversions recorded this month despite Rs.6,344 spend (Rs.7,486 incl. GST). Full waste with no signals to optimise. Pause immediately and redirect budget to PMax Swimwear (2.64x GST-corrected ROAS) or Brand Search (12.32x).
items.impact: Save Rs.7,486/month (incl. GST). Redirect to Brand Search or Swimwear PMax.

items.title: Pause: Meta Loungewear TOF — 0.73x GST-corrected ROAS, losing Rs.3,367
items.body: Meta Loungewear TOF spent Rs.10,762 (Rs.12,699 incl. GST) and returned only Rs.9,332 — a net loss of Rs.3,367 on ad spend alone, before COGS. At 0.73x, every Rs.1 spent returns Rs.0.73. Pause and test new creative angles before relaunch.
items.impact: Current loss: Rs.3,367 this month. Stop bleeding immediately.

items.title: Fix UTMs — 58% of orders are attribution-blind, blocking all real ROAS data
items.body: 181 of 313 Shopify orders have no UTM parameters. At 42% coverage, every campaign ROAS in this report is platform-reported only — not confirmed against retained revenue. Fix UTM tags on all Meta and Google ad URLs within 48 hours. Once above 60%, True ROAS per campaign becomes calculable.
items.impact: Unlocks Rs.9,62,679 of attributable revenue for real optimisation decisions.

items.title: Scale Brand Search (Google) — 12.32x GST-corrected ROAS on Rs.5,450 spend
items.body: Brand Search campaign returned Rs.79,224 on Rs.5,450 spend (Rs.6,431 incl. GST) — the highest ROAS in the account at 12.32x GST-corrected. Current spend is critically underfunded vs PMax Swimwear (Rs.85,675). Increase brand search budget to at least Rs.20,000/month and add branded negative keywords to all PMax campaigns to protect this traffic.
items.impact: Est. Rs.2,40,000 additional attributed revenue at current conversion rate.

items.title: Set ROAS floor to 3.50x dashboard (not 2.9x) for all campaigns going forward
items.body: With 13.7% return rate and 18% GST invisible cost, a 3.03x dashboard ROAS actually equals break-even. To clear margin, campaigns need to show 3.5x+ on platform dashboards to generate a real 1.5x+ True ROAS. Update all campaign tROAS targets and bid caps accordingly.
items.impact: Aligns all automated bidding with actual profitability, not dashboard illusion.

footer: Covera — True ROAS Money Flow Report  |  July 1–18, 2026  |  Generated by NQ Tracking Platform
Data sources: Meta Ads (act_1563572057756718, act_2017883648339248) · Google Ads (acc 2954447439, 1780146148) · Shopify Analytics (ShopifyQL)
UTM Coverage: 42% — campaign-level ROAS is platform-reported and GST-corrected. True retained ROAS (1.84x) is account-level only.
GST correction applies 18% to ad spend only. Revenue is Shopify net_sales (gross minus discounts and reversals). Margin estimates assume 45% gross margin; verify with your COGS actuals.
